prompt: The drawn rectangle is invisible against the white background. What is the bug?
choices: fillRect cannot be called twice on the same Graphics2D object
The second fillRect is drawn in the current color which is still WHITE after the background fill; no color change means the rectangle is invisible against the white background
Graphics2D.setColor must be called after each fillRect to reset the color
BufferedImage.TYPE_INT_RGB does not support the Color.WHITE constant
explanation: After filling the background with WHITE, the current Graphics2D color remains WHITE. The second fillRect(50,50,100,100) draws a white rectangle on a white background — completely invisible. Fix: call g2.setColor(Color.RED) (or any non-white color) before the second fillRect.
